name: Swing Time Golf Club
about: Swing Time Golf Club is a golf simulation venue located in Midland, Michigan, offering year-round golf experiences through advanced TrackMan simulators. The facility was founded by a Michigan native and Navy veteran with a lifelong passion for the game, providing an environment for players of all skill levels to improve and enjoy the sport. The club combines technology with tradition to offer a relaxed atmosphere where golfers can perfect their game in any weather condition.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology providing accurate shot tracking and course simulation
Year-round indoor play unaffected by weather conditions
Relaxed atmosphere suitable for golfers of all skill levels
Convenient location in Midland with professional service

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar technology for precise shot tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs to Swing Time Golf Club. The facility is designed for golfers to use their personal equipment during simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Swing Time Golf Club offers food and beverages on-site. While they have a kitchen and full bar, they do not appear to allow outside food or drinks to be brought into the facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round at Swing Time Golf Club takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of golfers in your group and the pace of play. The simulators allow for efficient play without waiting times between shots.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Time Golf Club is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers. The facility is designed for players of all skill levels and ages, making it suitable for families who want to enjoy golf together.
